channel.title: Technology - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Forza Horizon 6 update reduces 1,000-hour grind for multiplayer Xbox achievement - TrueAchievements
item.description:
1. Forza Horizon 6 update reduces 1,000-hour grind for multiplayer Xbox achievement  TrueAchievements
  2. Forza Horizon 6 Update Now Live On Xbox & PC, Free Car Being Given To All Players  Pure Xbox
  3. Forza Support Team Recommends Xbox Players Disable Quick Resume for Forza Horizon 6  IGN
  4. Forza Horizon 6 ‘Series 2’ update tweaks opponent behaviour, makes road discovery easier  Video Games Chronicle
  5. Forza Horizon 6 Patch Notes: Latest Update Addresses Drivatar Difficulty And More  Forbes

item.title: Upcoming Xbox Exclusives Are Being Sent Out To Die, Analyst Says; Xbox Pushes Back - GameSpot
item.description:
1. Upcoming Xbox Exclusives Are Being Sent Out To Die, Analyst Says; Xbox Pushes Back  GameSpot
  2. Microsoft denies killing Xbox exclusives — but the trust delta is real  Windows Central
  3. Xbox CSO Shuts Down Rumour About Exclusives, Insists They'll Happen Every Year  Pure Xbox
  4. Xbox Exclusives, Showcase Without Blade, Elder Scrolls 6, More From Matt Booty  Variety
  5. Xbox Promises Gears Of War: E-Day Exclusivity Is Not A Limited-Time Fake Out  Kotaku

item.title: Final Fantasy Resonance Interview: The First HD-2D FF Was Conceptualized 6-7 Years Ago and Inspired by Final Fantasy V - IGN
item.description:
1. Final Fantasy Resonance Interview: The First HD-2D FF Was Conceptualized 6-7 Years Ago and Inspired by Final Fantasy V  IGN
  2. Final Fantasy Resonance is filling a turn-based combat void this franchise has suffered for decades  Windows Central
  3. Final Fantasy Resonance devs comment on why turn-based RPGs are resurging  Nintendo Everything
  4. Final Fantasy Resonance Finally Brings HD-2D to the Series  Nintendojo
  5. Final Fantasy 6 Officially Returns October 2026  OpenCritic
